topStories.title: Rupee falls amidst gulf tensions and rising oil prices
topStories.summary: The Indian rupee weakened against the US dollar on Wednesday. This decline was driven by escalating tensions in the Gulf region and a subsequent rise in oil prices. The rupee touched 95.70 against the dollar. Higher oil prices impacted the currency. Peace talks between Tehran and Washington showed little progress. The government is finalizing measures to attract foreign capital.

topStories.title: Brokers prepare rollout of algo trading tools for retail investors
topStories.summary: Major brokers are set to launch algorithmic trading tools for retail investors in the coming months, following enhanced regulatory clarity. This move aims to expand broker revenue streams and help fintech firms scale by offering accessible algo strategies, potentially for as low as ₹5,000 per strategy.

topStories.title: Israel, Lebanon Agree To Renew Fragile Ceasefire After Negotiations With US
topStories.summary: Israel and Lebanon agreed Wednesday to implement a ceasefire.

topStories.summary: The Trump administration insists that the war against Iran is already over.

topStories.summary: The Israeli army's chief of staff has asserted that there is effectively no ceasefire in Lebanon.

topStories.summary: The remarks came after Ukrainian drones struck energy infrastructure in Russia's second-largest city, St. Petersburg, an attack Kyiv called retaliation for a mass wave of Russian strikes on Tuesday that killed at least 23 people.

topStories.title: West Asia war LIVE: Trump says Iran talks could yield result this weekend
topStories.summary: "I hear the negotiation itself is going very well, actually," Mr. Trump told reporters, adding of a potential deal, "It could happen... over the weekend."

topStories.title: Trump Says Iran Talks Going "Very Well", Could Yield Results This Weekend
topStories.summary: US President Donald Trump said Wednesday that talks with Iran could yield results over the coming weekend and are going "very well."

topStories.title: US Fed says Iran war driving 'moderate-to-strong' inflation
topStories.summary: US inflation rose at a moderate to strong pace, driven largely by surging energy costs linked to the Iran war, the Federal Reserve said. Higher oil prices disrupted supply chains and lifted input costs, while consumer spending showed widening inequality, with lower-income households facing rising financial strain.

topStories.title: Trump Says He Will Attend G7 Summit In France
topStories.summary: US President Donald Trump on Wednesday said in a post on Truth Social that he would travel to a Group of Seven leaders' summit in France.

topStories.title: US stocks today: Dow Jones drops over 500 points as Middle East tensions escalate
topStories.summary: Wall Street closed lower as Middle East tensions and rising oil prices triggered inflation concerns and profit booking. Financials and tech stocks led declines, though chipmakers stayed resilient on AI optimism. Strong services data and steady labor conditions contrasted with geopolitical risks, while expectations for a potential Fed rate hike continued to climb.

india.title: New details surface as ChudTheBuilder’s release bid stalls despite Alex Rosen offering $100,000 toward bond
india.summary: Dalton Eatherly, known as ChudTheBuilder, remains jailed after a Tennessee judge refused to lower his $1 million bond. YouTuber Alex Rosen offered $100,000 toward the bond, but Judge William Goodman III kept existing restrictions. Eatherly also faces separate charges in Nashville. The main case stems from a May 13 courthouse shooting involving Joshua Fox in Clarksville.

india.title: “Bro in a wheelchair?”: Clavicular’s new rhinoplasty recovery photos spark leg lengthening surgery speculation
india.summary: Clavicular’s post-surgery photos have become a major talking point online. While the images clearly show him recovering from rhinoplasty, the leg braces and wheelchair seen in one photo led to widespread speculation about possible additional procedures. So far, no confirmed information has been released about any surgery other than the rhinoplasty, leaving many questions unanswered.

india.title: Who is Hasan Piker’s mom Ülker Sedef? Report links her to streamer’s college transfer after low GPA
india.summary: Hasan Piker’s mother, Ülker Sedef Piker, is an art and architectural historian with degrees from Rutgers University and the New Jersey Institute of Technology. Hasan has often praised his mother, calling her a major source of inspiration.

business.title: Rupee falls amidst gulf tensions and rising oil prices
business.summary: The Indian rupee weakened against the US dollar on Wednesday. This decline was driven by escalating tensions in the Gulf region and a subsequent rise in oil prices. The rupee touched 95.70 against the dollar. Higher oil prices impacted the currency. Peace talks between Tehran and Washington showed little progress. The government is finalizing measures to attract foreign capital.

business.title: Brokers prepare rollout of algo trading tools for retail investors
business.summary: Major brokers are set to launch algorithmic trading tools for retail investors in the coming months, following enhanced regulatory clarity. This move aims to expand broker revenue streams and help fintech firms scale by offering accessible algo strategies, potentially for as low as ₹5,000 per strategy.

business.title: US Fed says Iran war driving 'moderate-to-strong' inflation
business.summary: US inflation rose at a moderate to strong pace, driven largely by surging energy costs linked to the Iran war, the Federal Reserve said. Higher oil prices disrupted supply chains and lifted input costs, while consumer spending showed widening inequality, with lower-income households facing rising financial strain.

business.title: US stocks today: Dow Jones drops over 500 points as Middle East tensions escalate
business.summary: Wall Street closed lower as Middle East tensions and rising oil prices triggered inflation concerns and profit booking. Financials and tech stocks led declines, though chipmakers stayed resilient on AI optimism. Strong services data and steady labor conditions contrasted with geopolitical risks, while expectations for a potential Fed rate hike continued to climb.

business.title: GQG Partners sells 1.8% stake in GMR Airports for Rs 1,906 crore; Fidelity buys holding
business.summary: US investment firm GQG Partners has sold a 1.8 per cent stake in GMR Airports to Fidelity International. The deal, valued at Rs 1,906 crore, saw GQG Partners offload 19.50 crore shares. Fidelity International acquired the same number of shares. This transaction occurred as GMR Airports reported a profit of Rs 400.49 crore for the March quarter.

business.title: SoftBank sells Rs 2,873 crore worth of Lenskart shares in block deal to Goldman Sachs and other investors

business.title: Ahead of Market: 10 things that will decide stock market action on Thursday
